nasb.text: Then He will give you rain for the seed which you will sow in the ground, and bread from the yield of the ground, and it will be rich and plenteous; on that day your livestock will graze in a roomy pasture.

esv.text: And he will give rain for the seed with which you sow the ground, and bread, the produce of the ground, which will be rich and plenteous. In that day your livestock will graze in large pastures,

cnv.text: 你撒在地裡的種子，主必降雨在其上，並且使你地裡所出產的糧食，既豐盛又肥美。到那日，你的牲畜必在寬闊的草場上吃草。

ccb.text: 你们撒种，主必降雨，并使你们五谷丰登。那时，你们的牲畜必在宽阔的草场上吃草；

csbs.text: 主必赐下雨水给你播在地里的种子，并要使地里出肥美丰盛的粮食。到那日，你的牲畜将在宽阔的草场上吃草；
